name: The Skoolage Team
title: AI Tutors, Learning Designers & Institutional Staff
education: Built on a belief that AI literacy is the new computer literacy
aboutLong: Skoolage exists because the world changed faster than education did. We are a lifelong learning institution built for the AI era — not a course marketplace, not a chatbot, not a temporary training vendor. Every learner receives a personalized AI Tutor, a structured Learning Path, and the opportunity to earn AI.M, our signature credential recognizing demonstrated practical capability. Graduation is not the end of the relationship. It is the beginning of lifelong membership — because as AI evolves, your education should evolve with it.
